text.p: It is a pity that I don't know that my paper is not related to your proposed book. However, since you suggested another outlet, I won't mind if you can get one for the paper. As for the book, I will re-read the flier to know what you really want. You can help delete the part of acknowlegement in my paper before sending it to any other outlet. Thank you and God bless. More grease to your elbow.
